name: reschedule_appointment
description: Move an existing booking to one exact staff-and-time slot returned by get_availability. Copy its slot_id exactly. Requires the current confirmation code and matching contact phone number. Only claim success when the tool succeeds, and report the team_member_name returned by this tool.

parameters.description: Booking credentials and the selected replacement slot.

phone.description: Contact phone number stored on the booking.

slot_id.description: Exact slot_id for the chosen replacement team member and time, copied from get_availability. Never invent or alter it.
